title: [ORBC] OresRBack - Create
description: Makes ores actually drop ores! - Create Edition
body:
## What does this mod do?
Everything that normal ORB also does, see [ORB](https://modrinth.com/mod/orb-oresrback)

## Create Edition??
Simply just for the Create Zinc Ore

## Bugs and Feature Requests???
Opens an issue on GitHub, or send me an mail to [this address](mailto:dev.bjsho@icloud.com)

### Disclaimer
This is not an official Minecraft product. Not approved by or associated with Mojang or Microsoft.
